title: 2ikker's Music Disc Plus
description: Have you ever wanted more music discs in Minecraft? Here you go, including community-made remixes and some original compositions!
body:
This mod adds a bunch of new music discs including the following:
- Remixes for most vanilla music discs (5, 11, and 13 excluded)
- New original compositions
- Methods of obtaining all music discs
    - Smithing Template for music remixing
    - Crafting recipes for new discs
